text:
The Character Song Collection is a collection of songs sung by voice actors of the Hunter × Hunter 2011 anime. The first collection features characters introduced at the beginning of the Hunter Exam arc and the TV-size opening theme.

Track list

GuuGuuGuu!! (Gon) (sung by Megumi Han)
Tell Me (Killua) (sung by Mariya Ise)
Leorio The HUNTER × DOCTOR (Leorio) (sung by Keiji Fujiwara)
Drop to the bottom (Tonpa) (sung by Toshiharu Sakurai)
Departure! (TV-size) (sung by Masatoshi Ono)
